metadata.title: Nail Seitai AI Diagnosis | Check Your Nail Health with AI
metadata.description: Check your nail health with Nail Seitai and AI diagnosis. Nail care information available in Japanese, English, and Arabic.

hero.title: Support Health with Nail Seitai
hero.subtitle: Check nail condition with AI diagnosis

health.title: Importance of Healthy Nails
health.description: Nails are called the 'barometer of health,' reflecting your body's condition. Noticing changes in color, shape, and thickness leads to early health management.

merit.title: Benefits of Nail Seitai
merit.description: By adjusting the shape and growth direction of nails, it improves blood circulation in fingertips and balances the entire body. Effective for preventing ingrown and deformed nails.

sports.title: Sports Performance Enhancement
sports.description: Proper nail care directly affects an athlete's grip and stability. Optimize your performance with nail seitai tailored to your sport.

step1.title: Simple 3 Steps
step1.description: Just take a photo of your nails and upload it. No registration required — start your diagnosis instantly.

step2.title: Instant Results
step2.description: Cutting-edge AI analyzes your nail condition instantly. Get a health score and an easy-to-understand report.

step3.title: Improvement Advice
step3.description: Receive specific improvement advice based on your results. From daily care tips to guidance on consulting specialists.

items.name: Misaki T.
items.comment: I was worried about my nail condition, but the AI diagnosis gave me specific advice and peace of mind. I check monthly now.

items.name: Kenta S.
items.comment: Thanks to nail seitai, my nail problems during running have drastically decreased. I feel my performance has improved too.

items.name: Akari Y.
items.comment: I use the AI diagnosis for client consultations. Having objective data makes explanations much easier.

cta.title: Try AI Diagnosis Now
cta.description: Simply upload a photo of your nails, and our AI will analyze your nail health.

about.title: About Nail Care
about.subtitle: Your nails are the barometer of your overall health

hero.title: How Nail Care Transforms Your Health
hero.description: Nails are a mirror reflecting the health of your fingertips, often called the second heart. Proper care supports your whole body's health.

importance.sectionTitle: How Nail Health Affects Your Whole Body

items.title: Cardiovascular Impact
items.description: Nail color and shape reflect blood circulation. Bluish nails may indicate oxygen deficiency; yellow nails may signal liver issues.

items.title: Nutritional Indicator
items.description: Vertical lines, horizontal ridges, and brittleness are signs of nutritional deficiency — particularly B12, iron, and zinc.

items.title: Stress & Fatigue Barometer
items.description: Intense stress and overwork can slow nail growth and cause deformation. Nail condition reveals mental and physical exhaustion.

items.title: Thyroid & Hormonal Function
items.description: Thyroid conditions and hormonal imbalances affect nail texture and growth patterns. Regular checks are important.

history.description: The history of nail care dates back to ancient civilizations. Ancient Egyptians used nail color to indicate social status, while Chinese traditional medicine used nail condition for diagnosis. In Japan, it evolved uniquely as 'Nail Seitai,' and today it is established as a scientifically grounded care method.

timeline.event: Nail care begins in ancient Egypt
Nail diagnosis incorporated into Chinese traditional medicine
Japan's unique nail care culture develops
Sports medicine and nail seitai begin to merge

science.description: Modern research has reported numerous correlations between nail condition and overall health.

stats.label: of diseases show symptoms in the nails (research survey)
nails grow approx. 3mm per month, recording health history

cta.title: Would you like to diagnose your nails?
cta.description: Check your nail health right now with AI.

nailSeitai.title: About Nail Seitai
nailSeitai.subtitle: Body improvement starting from your nails

hero.title: Maximize Your Performance with Nail Seitai
hero.description: Nail Seitai is a specialized technique that scientifically optimizes nail shape, angle, and length to improve physical function and sports performance.

what.description: Nail Seitai is a professional practice that adjusts nail shape and growth direction to maximize fingertip function and improve overall performance. Unlike cosmetic nail care, its primary purpose is physical function improvement.

features.title: Nail Shape Optimization
features.description: We propose and adjust the optimal nail shape and length based on your sport or profession.

features.title: Ingrown & Deformed Nail Correction
features.description: We safely correct ingrown and deformed nails that cause pain and discomfort.

features.title: Improved Circulation
features.description: Nail bed massage and nail correction promote blood circulation, sharpening fingertip sensitivity.

features.title: Preventive Care
features.description: Regular maintenance prevents nail problems before they occur, maintaining long-term health.

sports.description: For athletes, nail condition is a crucial factor that directly affects performance.

items.benefit: Optimizing nail length and shape improves push-off power and ground contact feel.
Fingertip sensation for controlling balls improves, enhancing grip and precision.
Prevent nail injuries during grappling while maximizing grip strength and fingertip power.
Shaping nails to minimize resistance when pulling water increases propulsion.

steps.title: Counseling & Diagnosis
steps.description: We listen to your current nail condition, lifestyle, and goals. Detailed diagnosis is performed with AI and visual examination.

steps.title: Cleaning & Preparation
steps.description: The nails and surrounding skin are thoroughly cleaned and prepared with specialized care products.

steps.title: Shape Adjustment & Correction
steps.description: Nail shape is adjusted to meet your goals. Correction tools are used as needed.

steps.title: Finishing & After-Care Guidance
steps.description: We explain home care methods after the treatment and the recommended interval for the next maintenance.

items.name: Client A (Marathon Runner, 40s)
items.before: Nails turned black and eventually fell off after every 10km run
items.after: Zero nail problems after 3 nail seitai sessions. Personal best improved by 3 minutes

items.name: Client B (Basketball Player, 20s)
items.before: Ingrown nail caused pain, affecting jumping and landing
items.after: Completely resolved after 2 months of correction treatment. Play quality improved

items.name: Client C (Desk Worker, 30s female)
items.before: Recurring cracked nails causing difficulty with typing
items.after: Nail strength improved with dietary guidance and regular care. Work efficiency increased

upload.title: Upload a Photo of Your Nails

upload.disclaimer: This service is not a medical diagnosis. Please consult a healthcare provider if you have concerning symptoms.

result.poor: Caution: We recommend reviewing your lifestyle habits
